title: メジロマックイーン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, Mejiro McQueen's journey to compete in
the Twinkle Series begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm super psyched for it as well. But first, I need to
head to the cafeteria for a bite to eat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Such a wonderful smell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There's a weightiness to it, yet it's delicate as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's nice and strong. It might not even need
sugar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(That's Mejiro Ryan, a member of the noted
Mejiro family. She's athletic and radiates energy.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The academy's cafe is rather elaborate, isn't it?
There are so many flavors on the menu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Mejiro Dober, also a member of the
Mejiro family. She's a bit hard to please.)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: L-look, look! They're from the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
They're having a high-class conversation! Just
how I thought they'd be!
choice_data_list:
(Now that I look at them again, they really do
have an impressive aura!)

(Now that I look at them again, they really do
have an impressive aura!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And last but not least, my trainee—Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her in this light, I can really sense the
noble air she emits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But, are you sure you don't want a chocolate
pudding crepe, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Yes, I'm sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm perfectly fine! I-I brought my own special
dessert, you see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Special dessert?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. I made it myself with nuts in place of flour.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Low in sugar and high in protein, it's very
nutritious. Above all else, the exquisite flavor
solidifies it as an exceptional dessert.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's wonderful. In that case, I'm sure you
wouldn't mind if I had one of those crepes myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course, go right ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a closer look at the dessert Mejiro
McQueen has and realize it's from a recipe I once
taught her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be working hard to reach her goals,
just like always.
choice_data_list: You're giving it your all, aren't you?
You're giving it your all, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's McQueen's trainer. Hi!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. McQueen has been working hard
nonstop lately!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Having set a goal to conquer the Tenno Sho, it's
only natural for me to work hard to reach it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, my debut is very soon, which
means I must brace myself and focus all the more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. I hope you'll accompany me with
the intention of doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's gonna be a long time before you
compete in the Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Shouldn't you be aiming for the Classics first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, consider conquering the Tenno Sho my
ultimate goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before that, I plan to achieve success in the
Classics and make steady progress toward the
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahh. Then I guess that means we'll be meeting at
the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I'm not gonna lose! I've had my
sights on the Classic Triple Crown for a long time
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm well aware of just how hard you've been
working.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I won't be going easy on you either. I'll
be giving the Classics everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's both give it our best shot! ...Oh, it
looks like Dober is back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, awesome! There really is chocolate
pudding on top of the crepe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what did you say?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for bringing one for me too, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It was no trouble. No one else was in line. Well, I
think I'll go ahead and dig in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gulp...
choice_data_list: You wish you'd gotten one after all, don't you?
You wish you'd gotten one after all, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, uh, no, that's not it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fighting to restrain myself or anything of
the sort!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, Mejiro McQueen and I have begun
aiming for the Tenno Sho in earnest!
